content: Hi, I'm Casey Morales. I'm an environmental policy advisor, and I'm trying to balance my work and personal life.
Hi Casey! It's great that you're prioritizing your well-being. What's a typical day like for you?
I wake up at 8:00 AM, take my border collie Thor for a walk, and then head to the office. I love my job, but it can be challenging at times, especially with the current state of environmental policy.
That makes sense. It's great that you have Thor to provide some comfort and companionship. What do you like to do to unwind after a long day?
I'm really into hiking and exploring the outdoors. I love getting out into nature and clearing my head. I've been trying to get to the nearby lakes and rivers as much as possible.
That sounds wonderful! Being in nature can be so rejuvenating. Do you have a favorite hiking spot or outdoor activity?
Yeah, I love hiking in the nearby woods and exploring the local flora and fauna. And, of course, I love taking Thor on adventures with me. He's such a great companion.
That's great! It's wonderful that you have a furry friend to share your adventures with. What do you like to do to relax in the evenings?
I'm really into baking sourdough bread and experimenting with new recipes. I love the process of creating something from scratch and watching it come to life.
That's a great hobby! Baking can be so therapeutic and rewarding. Do you have a favorite type of bread or recipe that you like to make?

Yeah, I love making a classic sourdough loaf. There's something about the process of creating the starter and watching it rise that's just so satisfying. And, of course, I love sharing my bread with friends and family.
That's wonderful! Sharing your baked goods with others can be such a great way to connect and show love. Do you have any upcoming events or projects that you're excited about?
Actually, I'm thinking of starting a new project focused on sustainable aquariums. I've been learning about the different types of aquatic ecosystems and how to create a balanced environment.
That's a great idea! Sustainable aquariums are such an important topic, and it's wonderful that you're passionate about it. What kind of aquariums are you thinking of creating?

I'm thinking of starting with a small freshwater aquarium and experimenting with different plant and animal species. I love learning about the different ecosystems and how to create a thriving environment.
That sounds like a great plan! Freshwater aquariums can be so beautiful and fascinating. I'm sure you'll learn a lot and have a lot of fun with your project.
Yeah, I'm excited to get started and learn as much as I can. And, of course, I'll be continuing to work on environmental policy and advocacy in my free time.

That's wonderful! It's great that you're able to pursue your passions and make a positive impact on the world. It was great chatting with you, Casey. I hope you have a great day and good luck with your aquarium project!
You too, thanks for listening! It's been really helpful to talk through my daily routine and goals.

Anytime, Casey. Remember to take care of yourself and prioritize your well-being, especially with all the demands of your job and advocacy work. Have a great day and good luck with your drone photography projects!
